raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) affects an estimated 3 million Americans.",
    "IBD causes chronic inflammation in the gastrointestinal (GI) tract.",
    "Enteral nutrition (EN) is a liquid dietary treatment for IBD.",
    "Enteral nutrition can be administered as the primary treatment of IBD, called exclusive enteral nutrition (EEN).",
    "Exclusive Enteral Nutrition can provide the full amount of necessary calories without solid food.",
    "EEN can be the main therapy for mild to moderate cases of Crohn’s Disease in children and adolescents.",
    "EEN serves as an alternative to corticosteroids for treatment, mitigating the risk of tolerance and growth impairment associated with steroid use.",
    "EEN is a cheaper alternative to steroids.",
    "Studies show the benefits of medical enteral nutrition for IBD patients, particularly pediatric patients.",
    "Health plans are not required to cover enteral nutrition, including over the counter options."
  ]
}
```
